item.TDLINE: Received above material in good condition
Received above material in good condition
TERMS AND CONDITIONS : 1) Our responsibility ceases on delivery of goods
to Transporter. 2) No Claim will be entertained if not lodged within two
weeks from the date of our invoice . 3) All transactions and bills are
subject to Pune Jurisdication. 4) If the appropriate declaration Forms
for MVat / Central Tax is not received within one month from the date of
billing; Our debit note will be sent for Sale Tax difference. 5)
Interest @ 24% will be charged extra if not paid within agreed period.
TERMS AND CONDITIONS : 1) Our responsibility ceases on delivery of goods
to Transporter. 2) No Claim will be entertained if not lodged within two
weeks from the date of our invoice . 3) All transactions and bills are
subject to Pune Jurisdication. 4) If the appropriate declaration Forms
for MVat / Central Tax is not received within one month from the date of
billing; Our debit note will be sent for Sale Tax difference. 5)
Interest @ 24% will be charged extra if not paid within agreed period.
